creator: arrowd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Ed Maste from comment #9)
Yep, and IIRC, it is present even when compiling hello world written in haskell. You don't actually need to build GHC itself, just configure bootstrap compiler with lld and use it to compile helloworld.hs.

Anyway, thanks for digging into this and filing the bug. I still messing with GHC update and have no change to look at this linker problem.
